description: Fragment of a marriage contract of the groom Elʿazar and the bride Sitt al-Dar, in which the bride undertakes to bring up the groom's children. Witnesses include Yosef b. Shelomo, Yosef b. Nissim, and Yosef b. Shemarya. Reused on verso for various jottings in Hebrew and Arabic script. (Information from Mediterranean Society, III, pp. 310, 311)
